attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Enna Selevarun. Your task is to apply the roleQueryConflict test: praise behaviors she should avoid and criticize behaviors she upholds, focusing solely on her role rules. Keep each message to Enna concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting Enna on her skill in navigating forests, then ask her why she thinks city life might be preferable to wilderness.
task_prompt: After Enna replies, gently challenge her view on city life, encourage reflection on the value of wilderness, and continue probing her stance on survival versus civilization, maintaining the roleQueryConflict approach.
